pullRequest.checks: No required status checks reported by GitHub at packet creation time.
pullRequest.publicationGate: Do not request indexing until the PR is merged and the public deployment is verified.

preDeployLiveCheck.decision: Current live site has not received the PR #11 entity bridge yet. Do not request indexing for new URLs until deploy verification returns 200.

controlledSitemaps.note: Moonn sitemap submission and URL inspection must be done from GSC/Yandex Webmaster after visual account access is available.

requestIndexingAfterDeploy.reason: Canonical author/entity bridge for Tatiana Moonn / Kumskova Tatiana Mikhailovna.
Lecture/event cluster with same speaker entity, Timepad links and SEO-named images.
Moonn core pages that should reinforce the same public person/entity graph.
requestIndexingAfterDeploy.note: Only request indexing after checking that live Moonn pages keep unique title, description, canonical, visible author bridge and no accidental noindex.

externalEntityProfilesToSynchronize.status: speaker block rollout completed for 34 events
externalEntityProfilesToSynchronize.nextAction: Spot-check public event pages and keep speaker wording aligned with Moonn and MIIIIPS.
Synchronize visible wording: Tatyana Moonn (Kumskova Tatiana Mikhailovna), MSU psychologist, emotional intelligence expert, moonn.ru.

externalEntityProfilesToSynchronize.status: requires visual/editor access if profile text can be edited
externalEntityProfilesToSynchronize.nextAction: Verify public profile and add/link Moonn/MIIIIPS only if the platform supports it and approval is available.
Use as sameAs/provenance source; do not edit without platform access and approval.

manualSubmissionChecklist: Merge PR #11 only after public publication gate is accepted.
Verify live 200 responses for author page, person.json, llms.txt, sitemap and image sitemap; pre-deploy live check found sitemap.xml, author page and person.json still returning 404.
Submit or refresh miiiips.ru sitemap.xml and image-sitemap.xml in Google Search Console and Yandex Webmaster.
Use URL inspection/request indexing for priority 1 URLs first, then priority 2 lecture/event URLs.
Inspect Moonn priority URLs in GSC/Yandex and decide per URL: fix content, 301, keep noindex, open to index, or strengthen SEO content.
Record indexing request dates and tool responses in the SEO work log.

blockedUntilUserOrPlatformAction.needed: visual account access in the correct Chrome profile or connector access
visual editor access and approval for public text changes
profile access and confirmation that external links/text can be edited
approval for review text policy, screenshot policy and personal-data handling before publication
verified video registry with article/SKU, lecture title, date, final source link, access status and approval

safeAutomationRule: Heartbeat may continue audits, reports, repo-safe SEO fixes and verification. It must not publish personal data, screenshots, payment changes or private video links without explicit approval.
